## Slides: Genome sequencing, sequencing technologies, and data types {.custom-title-slide}

<div class="title-author">(Vinc)Enza Colonna - University of Tennessee, USA</div>
<div class="title-subtitle">EMBO Practical Course in Pangenomics</div>
<div class="title-subtitle">Torre deo Greco, Italy - June 2026</div>

<div class="title-images">
  <img src="figures/bc1.jpg" alt="">
  <img src="figures/bc2.jpg" alt="">
  <img src="figures/bc3.jpg" alt="">
  <img src="figures/bc4.jpg" alt="">
</div>
